All right, let's go ahead and set up your lead ads so that your leads will go to Your Google sheet so we're in Zapier. We're creating a zap. I'm going to name this Facebook lead ads So your trigger here is going to be Facebook lead ads We want it to trigger when you get a new lead go ahead and choose your Facebook account Choose your business page here Choose the form that you just made When you get to this part it automatically puts one in there so I'm gonna go ahead and test the step Now we need to add an action step and that's gonna be Google sheets Create a row I Just gonna pick one of these here choose your spreadsheet and then which page you want it to go on I Usually put the date on mine. I don't know if you guys do but if you have the date you can do created time Then first name Last name Phone number And email address click continue And you can send the test to the Google sheet to make sure that it shows up on there And then click finish And then click done then you can go look at your Google sheet and see if it said Facebook dummy on it I know mine did so I hope this helps you guys You
